subcodes.first_line: O ye who are steadfast in the Covenant! The congratulations on the joyful birthday of Hazrat-i-Aala (the Declaration of the Bab) shows that these dear friends and handmaidens of the Merciful held a gathering
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر عهد تبریک عید سعید مولد حضرت اعلی رسید دلیل بر آن بود که آن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @music and singing
